### Changes

<!-- Describe what you have built or changed -->
Changes:
    + Project Structure: Organized the repo into a modular component-based architecture (common, layout, home) for better scalability.
    + Development Workflow: Followed a bottom-up approach, building small UI atoms first before composing them into full sections like Hero and Footer.
    + Asset Extraction: Extracted original SVG icons directly from the Fessior site using Chrome DevTools (Sources & Network tabs) and the Resource Saver extension to ensure 100% brand fidelity.
Core Components:
    + Implemented header which contains Logo, nav bar including Home, URL Shortener, QR Gen, Resources which also take user to webpage just like the OG!
    + Implemented Header(Hero) looks similarly (80% - 90%) to the OG! :>
    + Implemented ShortenerForm which is a lil differs from the website. Of course, you can only types in the input cuz its just frontend.
    + Implemented FeatureCard with help of LLM(GEMINI) cuz i dont really know how to structure it!!! Also adding some scale hover effect.
    + Finally the Footer which can also implement by HTML only but not in my case.
